title: rubus percrispus
intro: Rubus percrispus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of thorny shrub native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rubus percrispus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and coughs. Rubus percrispus can be prepared as a tea or tincture, with herbalists often using the leaves and roots to create these preparations.
